system.description:
The use of siege engines such as ballistae and catapults. In higher-tech settings, this also covers the use of primitive cannons.
  • Setting up a siege engine in a secure location: Artillery/INT 8+
  • Attempt counter-battery fire: Artillery/EDU 10+
system.shortdescr: Use of siege engines, ballistae, catapults, and primitive cannons.
